data.body:
Are you enjoying our 1st Anniversary Special Broadcast?

Celebrate with us by commenting with this hashtag: #BlueArchive_Happy_1stAnniversary – 30 Lucky Senseis will receive Pyroxene x600!![TiJ5cHjia61QBD1zySE3XV16RZSacYM2.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/TiJ5cHjia61QBD1zySE3XV16RZSacYM2.jpg)
